title: Yoshi Labs Client Brief
description: Source of truth for every client build. Every field is used by Claude Code to generate the website and chatbot.

business_name.description: Exact legal/display name of the business. Used in nav, hero h1, footer, SEO title, chatbot greetings.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier. Used for Vercel subdomain, API endpoints, folder names. Lowercase, hyphens only.

business_type.description: Determines which design template to use. Maps to .claude/skills/industry-design-system.md

package.description: Starter: website + chatbot. Pro: + booking + SMS + Google Business.

tagline.description: One-line value proposition for the hero section. If empty, Claude generates one based on business_type and services.

address.description: Full street address for Google Maps embed and SEO.

maps_embed_url.description: Google Maps embed URL. If empty, generate from address.

landmark.description: Nearby landmark for directions. Filipinos navigate by landmarks.

phone.description: Primary contact number. Format: 09XX-XXX-XXXX. Used for click-to-call and WhatsApp button.

facebook_url.description: Facebook page URL. Used for social link and photo scraping source.

instagram_url.description: Instagram profile URL. Used for photo scraping source.

viber.description: Viber number if different from phone.

name.description: Owner name. Used in About section and as Cal.com booking host.

photo.description: Path to owner photo in /photos/. If empty, skip owner photo.

bio.description: 2-3 sentences about the owner. If empty, generate based on business_type.

services.description: Every service the business offers. This feeds the Services section AND the chatbot knowledge base.

description.description: 1-2 sentence description for the service card.

price.description: Price as displayed text. Use ₱ symbol. Can be range.

duration.description: Service duration. Used by chatbot for booking estimates.

category.description: Group services under categories for the services section.

popular.description: If true, show a 'Popular' badge on the service card.

hours.description: Business hours. Used in Contact section, SEO, and chatbot responses.

about.description: Business story for the About section. 3-5 sentences. If empty, generate based on business_type, owner, and services.

brand.description: Visual identity. If empty, use the industry template defaults.

logo_path.description: Path to logo file in /photos/. If empty, use text-only business name as logo.

primary_color.description: Override the template accent color. Must be valid hex.

style_preference.description: If set, overrides the default template for this industry.

photos.description: References to downloaded photos in /photos/ directory.

hero.description: Best photo for hero section. Path relative to /photos/.

gallery.description: Paths to gallery images. Max 12. Path relative to /photos/.

services.description: Service-specific photos. Maps to services array by index.

seo.description: SEO overrides. If empty, auto-generate from business data.

chatbot.description: Chatbot personality overrides. If empty, auto-generate from business data.

greeting.description: First message the chatbot shows. Default: 'Hi! Welcome to {business_name}. How can I help you today?'

use_po_opo.description: Use Filipino respect markers (po/opo) in responses.

fallback_phone.description: If AI can't answer, direct customer to call the business.

lead_capture_after_messages.description: After N messages, ask for name and phone number.

cal_event_length.description: Default booking slot length in minutes.

google_business_category.description: Google Business Profile category. Auto-mapped from business_type if empty.
